rootCause: The shared Playwright hydration helper waited on an in-page requestIdleCallback/setTimeout bridge via page.evaluate. On slow route sweeps this evaluate call could stall until the overall test timeout, causing nav smoke and grouped E2E runs to fail before assertions completed.
resolution: Replaced the brittle idle-callback bridge with a short deterministic waitForTimeout pause after page load and main visibility checks so hydration waits no longer deadlock test execution.
